zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Oakley於1435年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素時，他的父親Jenkin Oakley35歲，母親Joanne Griffith31歲。他於1459年與Margaret Blundell在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1470年在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Oakley于1435年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素时，他的父亲Jenkin Oakley35岁，母亲Joanne Griffith31岁。他于1459年与Margaret Blundell在英国英格兰史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1470年在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Oakley was born in 1435, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jenkin Oakley, was 35 and his mother, Joanne Griffith, was 31. He married Margaret Blundell in 1459, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1470, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Oakley est né en 1435, à Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jenkin Oakley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joanne Griffith, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Blundell en 1459, à Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Oakleyが1435年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルで生まれた時，父Jenkin Oakleyは35歳，母Joanne Griffithは31歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルでMargaret Blundellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1470年に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Oakley(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jenkin Oakley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne Griffith(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 Margaret Blundell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1470년 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Oakley родился в 1435 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jenkin Oakley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanne Griffith, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Blundell в 1459 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1470 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.
